description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with a before_script that runs "yarn --silent" and "yarn --cwd ./functions --silent" for all jobs. Define two stages, build and deploy. Add a build_develop job in the build stage that runs only on the develop branch, sets the dev environment, executes "chmod +x ./config.sh", "yarn run build:client-and-server-bundles" and "yarn --cwd functions run build", caches "node_modules/" and "functions/node_modules/" keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, and saves the artifacts paths "functions/dist/" and "functions/lib/". Add a build_prod job in the build stage that runs only on master, sets the prod environment, runs the same three commands, uses the same cache, and stores the same artifacts. Add a deploy_develop job in the deploy stage that depends on build_develop, runs only on develop, sets the dev environment and runs "yarn run deploy". Add a deploy_production job in the deploy stage that depends on build_prod, runs only on master, sets the prod environment and runs "yarn run deploy".
